global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with abstract shapes and prominent text.
global.main_message: Promoting binge-worthy content available on NeonCast.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A large pink circle and an oval shape are centered in the ad, creating an abstract visual interest.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A smaller pink circle is positioned within the main subject area, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A tiny pink circle is placed near the bottom of the main subject area, serving as a decorative touch.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold white text reads 'Binge starts now New hits every week', prominently displayed in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now New hits every week

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: The logo 'NeonCast' appears at the top in a bold font, colored white against the red background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom reads 'Shop now' in white text, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small 'UGC' label is positioned at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bold and modern, features abstract shapes and engaging text.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now New hits every week, NeonCast, Shop now, UGC
